title: Home Screen - Disconnecting/Connecting one earbud at a time
scenario: Verify individual earbud disconnect/reconnect behavior on Home Screen, including grey-out states and status updates, with a note that Osprey charge case battery indicator does not grey out when one earbud reconnects.
steps: Verify the right earbud greys out while the left earbud stays connected and the overall status shows 'Connected'.
Verify the right earbud reconnects properly.
Verify the left earbud greys out while the right earbud stays connected.
Verify both earbuds grey out and the status shows 'Disconnected'.
expected: Each earbud greys out when disconnected while the other remains connected. Overall status updates correctly ('Connected' when at least one earbud is connected, 'Disconnected' when both are disconnected). Reconnection works properly. For Osprey devices, the charge case battery indicator does not grey out when one earbud is reconnected.
